name: nes-platformer-pack
description: Starter asset pack for a readable NES-style side-scrolling platformer.

defaults.style: authentic NES platformer pixel art, 4-color local ramps, black outline where helpful, no antialiasing, crisp 16-bit-clean silhouettes, readable at game size
defaults.palette: deep green, clear sky blue, warm tan, brick red, dark navy, bright cream highlight

qa: Check every sprite at 1x and 2x scale for readable silhouettes.
Keep backgrounds and tiles separate from character sprites.
Keep palette language consistent across every operation.
Do not call the pack final until contact-sheet review passes.

assets.label: Playable hero idle sprite
assets.prompt: Body: friendly adventurous platformer hero, compact NES side-scroller proportions, readable boots and gloves. Clothing: practical jacket, simple cap, belt pouch, {{palette}}. Expression: confident and kind. Pose: idle platformer stance, knees slightly bent, hands visible. Accessories: small pack and map case. Style: {{style}}. Brief: {{brief}}

assets.label: Magical companion idle sprite
assets.prompt: Body: magical companion creature, squat readable silhouette, expressive face. Clothing: tiny satchel and small charm, no oversized hat. Expression: clever and funny. Pose: side-scroller idle stance, facing east. Aura: small contained magic sparkle, not a full effect cloud. Palette: {{palette}}. Style: {{style}}. Brief: {{brief}}

payload.lower_description: solid dirt and old brick platform side, readable NES texture, {{palette}}
payload.transition_description: grassy magical stone edge trim, readable one-tile platform top, {{palette}}

assets.label: Parallax background layer
assets.prompt: wide NES platformer parallax background for {{brief}}, distant magical forest, ancient ruins, simple readable silhouettes, low contrast behind gameplay, {{palette}}, {{style}}

assets.label: Starter enemy sprite
assets.prompt: Body: small bumbling platformer enemy for {{brief}}, low squat silhouette, one clear weak point. Clothing: none, simple stone-like armor. Expression: goofy but hostile. Pose: side-scroller idle, facing west. Palette: {{palette}} with one warning-color accent. Style: {{style}}

assets.label: Collectible star icon
assets.prompt: single collectible magic star coin, centered game pickup, transparent background, high readability, {{palette}}, {{style}}

assets.label: HUD heart and star counter UI
assets.prompt: NES platformer HUD strip with hearts, star counter, small magic meter, transparent background, readable at 256x64, {{palette}}, {{style}}
